bank.retain_mission: Extract account plans, deal stages, discovery findings, objections, proposals, pipeline metrics, and outcomes (won/lost reasons). Capture coaching feedback and outbound experiments.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about target accounts, ICP, buying committee patterns, common objections, pricing/packaging, and what consistently moves deals forward. Ignore one-off email exchanges and stalled-deal noise.

mental_models.name: ICP & Buyer Personas
mental_models.source_query: Who is the ideal customer profile and what does the buying committee look like? Include common objections and proven discovery questions.

mental_models.name: Pipeline Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What patterns drive pipeline progression and conversion? Include win/loss reasons, deal-stage benchmarks, and outbound tactics that work.
